title: hornungia angustilimbata
intro: Hornungia angustilimbata, also known as Hornungia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve liver function. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including liver and kidney problems, as well as to boost the immune system and improve overall health. Hornungia angustilimbata can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts for medicinal use.
